title: Safe Zones
description: This is a simple plugin that allows you to create a safe zone where players cant take damage!
body: SafeZone is a lightweight Minecraft plugin that lets you create rectangular protected zones where PvP, mob damage, and block breaking are disabled. Perfect for spawn areas, shops, or any location you want to keep safe. Players can use /safezone set <name> <width> <length> to define a zone centered on their current position, and /safezone remove <name> to delete it. Zones are stored in memory and enforced via event listeners. No external dependencies, no bloat—just clean protection logic. Ideal for small servers, community hubs, or mythic realms that need a touch of order. Future updates will include config persistence, visual indicators, and permission support. Built for Spigot 1.13+ and designed to be fast, simple, and effective.
